title: Computational Thinking
builds_on: Part A (P1-P6) - a working Python and Git baseline
scope: Decomposition, abstraction, pseudocode, flowcharts, specification writing, when NOT to use AI.

assessments.title: Python Foundations Diagnostic
assessments.outcome: The learner can model data with classes, handle files and errors robustly, and maintain a professional Git portfolio - confirming readiness to begin the AI modules.
